creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
The pkg repository is updated!
On http://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:13:aarch64/ the directory date changed.
From:
latest/    2020-Jan-04 12:39
To:
latest/    2020-May-16 06:24

And http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/ shows happy compile runs again.

Case closed. Thanks anonymous somebody for fixing this.
